## Summary

<!-- Brief description of what this PR does and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to
      not work as expected)
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup (no functional change)
- [ ] Documentation / CI only

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this change? Reference test cases added/modified. -->

- [ ] `ctest --test-dir build --output-on-failure` passes locally
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality
- [ ] `clang-format --dry-run -Werror` reports no changes needed

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project style guide (`clang-format` / `clang-tidy` clean)
- [ ] Self-reviewed the diff
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]` if applicable
- [ ] No new compiler warnings introduced
- [ ] No secrets / credentials committed
